summary: Identified confidence gate bypass: model_bridge has lower MIN_CONFIDENCE (0.25) than bot_core risk checks (0.60-0.65), allowing intents to pass bridge but then be rejected by check_entry_gates. However, trades 241/243/244 appear to have been created on 2026-04-11 despite meeting low confidence, suggesting either timing gap in deployment or insufficient restart enforcement.

restart_timing.log_evidence: Multiple bot restarts visible in bot_baseball_20260410.log between 09:13 and 18:52. Last explicit 'starting' message at 2026-04-10 18:52:24. Trades 241/243/244 have timestamps 2026-04-11 00:00:29 onwards (after log file date boundary).

trades_verdict.before_after_restart: UNCLEAR - trades appear post-restart per timestamps, but logs do NOT show BRIDGE OPEN entries for these trade IDs. No corresponding entries in bot_baseball_20260411.log showing when/how they were opened.

current_gate_rejection_evidence.note: These rejections are dated 2026-04-10 (BEFORE trades 241/243/244 timestamps), showing the gate WAS working on 04-10.

bot_core_tier.behavior: Rejects intents with confidence < 0.60 (observed in logs)

issue_details.mismatch_consequence: model_bridge's 0.25 floor is MUCH lower than bot's 0.60 floor, but bot_core should catch and reject. This is working as designed based on 04-10 logs.

discrepancy_details.observation: Trades 241/243/244 exist in database with ts_open on 2026-04-11 00:00:29 onwards
discrepancy_details.expectation: Should see BRIDGE OPEN trade=241/243/244 messages in bot_baseball_20260411.log
discrepancy_details.reality: No BRIDGE OPEN messages found for these trade IDs in any log
possible_explanations: 1. Trades were inserted directly to database bypassing normal code path (administrative/manual insertion)
2. Log entries were suppressed or not flushed for these specific opens
3. Trades were created by a different bot instance or process not captured in main logs
4. Database timestamps are inaccurate or don't reflect actual creation time

current_live_gate_status.verdict: YES, gate rejection IS currently working
current_live_gate_status.evidence: 04-10 logs show repeated confidence_too_low rejections with threshold 0.60

critical_finding: The trades 241/243/244 do not appear in logs as BRIDGE OPEN despite existing in database. This suggests they may have been created outside the normal bot_core code path, or there is a gap between code that is running and logs being generated. The confidence gate logic itself appears sound based on 04-10 rejection evidence, but these specific trades bypass the audit trail.

immediate: Audit database insert logs or application logs to find where trades 241/243/244 were inserted
Verify trades 241/243/244 are not from manual database operations
Check if log flushing or buffering is suppressing BRIDGE OPEN entries for these trades
next_steps: Correlate trade_forensics_*.jsonl logs to see if trades 241/243/244 appear there
Check if there are concurrent bot processes writing to database
Verify ENABLE_MODEL_BRIDGE gate state at time of trade opens on 04-11
